message:
feat(replay): fault-injection DSL with seeded PRNG and built-in presets (ft-og6q6.4.2)

FaultSpec TOML format, FaultInjector with delay/drop/corrupt/reorder/
duplicate faults, EventFilter predicates, FaultLog, and presets
(rate_limit_storm, pane_death, clock_skew, network_partition).
Deterministic via SplitMix64 PRNG. 33 unit + 21 property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
